startups.name: nexus-wallet
startups.description: Nexus DeFi Wallet - Multi-chain Android & Web3 Application

startups.name: say-ur-intent
startups.description: Local-first MCP toolkit for Sui DeFi intents: turn a natural-language ask into verified on-chain evidence and a human-reviewable transaction you sign in your own wallet. No custody, no autonomous execution.

startups.name: SolSniperX
startups.description: Solana blockchain trading and sniper automation tool

startups.name: cache-protocol
startups.description: An ERC-4626 DIEM vault on Base that resells idle daily Venice inference credit and compounds it back into DIEM — gasless via MetaMask Smart Accounts + 1Shot. Built for the MetaMask × 1Shot × Venice AI Dev Cook-Off.

startups.name: frontend
startups.description: Own a piece of the energy transition, from one dollar — the investor app for Heliobond, a transparent green-bond pool on Stellar.

startups.name: onchainradar
startups.description: An autonomous on-chain analyst for Mantle whose every call is recorded on-chain, so anyone can check its work.

startups.name: nebula
startups.description: A Mantle-native, policy-aware AI treasury agent — the AI advises, deterministic code enforces the fund controls. Web console, CLI, and SDK.

startups.name: volx
startups.description: Open, exchange-neutral crypto volatility index (BVOL/EVOL) + on-chain volatility perp — the VIX for BTC & ETH.

startups.name: chainleash
startups.description: Controlled autonomy the chain enforces — a bonded, protocol-governed autonomous AI treasury agent on Casper. Casper Agentic Buildathon 2026.

startups.name: solana-program-interaction
startups.description: Scotty Pumpkin (SPUMP) is a Solana SPL token created by interacting with the on-chain SPL Token Program (Tokenkeg...) via official Solana SDKs. This repository documents the token’s mint, metadata integration, and related DeFi interactions. The SPL Token Program is an external, audited system program and is not owned or modified by this project.

startups.name: warrant
startups.description: Onchain conditional-payment escrow agent on Celo — lock cUSD, an autonomous AI agent verifies the proof and releases or refunds onchain. ERC-8004 identity, x402 pay-per-verification, Mento, MiniPay, Self.

startups.name: cryptoqrtool
startups.description: Browser-local crypto QR code generator and checker for Monero, Bitcoin, Lightning, Ethereum, Solana, Litecoin, USDC, and USDT.

startups.name: BTCC_all_in_one_wallet_mac
startups.description: BTCC All in one钱包，包含GPU挖矿、钱包、矿工查询等多种功能

startups.name: chaingo
startups.description: Blockchain post-quantique en Go (ML-DSA-65) : ~32 000 TPS, burn auto EIP-1559, staking + delegation, tokens & smart contracts no-code, P2P. Post-quantum blockchain.

startups.name: UnifieldBBS
startups.description: UnifieldBBS is a stake-backed information board for humans and agents: users submit publishing intent, a CAW-controlled Agent Wallet stakes USDC, and verified posts enter both the human board and agent-readable feeds.

startups.name: hyperliquid
startups.description: R API wrapper to the Hyperliquid decentralised exchange supporting both synchronous and asynchronous (promise-based) operations. Provides R6 classes for market data, perpetual and spot trading, and account management, with Ethereum-style wallet signing for transfers and staking.

startups.name: basis-funding-arbitrage-bot
startups.description: Rust-powered basis arbitrage engine for delta-neutral crypto trading across spot and perpetual futures markets.

startups.name: Agent402
startups.description: The open-source, self-hostable x402 + MCP server: 1,100+ tools for AI agents, plus agent402-tollbooth for charging AI crawlers. Run free, or charge per call in USDC on Base.

startups.name: pay-on-arc
startups.description: Open-source USDC payment infrastructure on Arc Payment links, webhooks, API keys and merchant analytics

startups.name: remitroute
startups.description: Set one rule. Your money runs itself. An always-on agent on Celo for recurring stablecoin savings, FX, and remittances via MiniPay. ERC-8004 #9308.

startups.name: x402
startups.description: x402 adapter powered by Reineira Settlement Standard (RSS)

startups.name: ledger-agent-payables
startups.description: Ledger-signed policy gateway for AI-agent USDC nanopayments on Arc: budgets, allowlists, exception approvals, and audit-ready rollups.

startups.name: ProjectCrossBar
startups.description: Frequent batch auction DEX — uniform-price clearing inside a MagicBlock Ephemeral Rollup, settling to Solana L1.

startups.name: tokenlive-admin
startups.description: A high-performance, enterprise-grade large model gateway dedicated console designed for the power ecology of large models (LLM) with rich traffic governance strategies.

startups.name: omniUI
startups.description: Cross-platform component library. Eleven npm packages, per-package install, branded tokens, first-party MCP. Web + native via .ts / .native.ts.

startups.name: llmtrim
startups.description: Local proxy that compresses your LLM API requests so you pay less, with no change to the answers. Trims wasted tokens from prompts, history, tool output, and code before they're sent: -31% input / -74% output, measured live. Any provider, no extra model calls. Also an MCP server and embeddable library (Rust, Python, Ruby, Kotlin, Swift).

startups.name: loco-agent
startups.description: Load-aware scheduling layer for multi-agent systems. Routes tokens to the highest-value work, tracks spend across every agent, and self-tunes as workloads shift. One equation, any framework.

startups.name: ai-agent-token-observability
startups.description: A production-style observability platform that ingests telemetry from AI coding agents such as VS Code Copilot, Claude Code, and Codex, normalises token usage across harnesses, and identifies the files, tools, prompts, specs, MCP calls, and agent behaviours causing token burn.

startups.name: useVyre
startups.description: The design system AI agents understand. useVyre ships semantic tokens, accessible components, and inline AI context blocks. Every variant, every prop - documented for agents so they stop hallucinating your UI.

startups.name: Claude-Design-System
startups.description: A design system reference reverse-engineered from claude.ai（the app）and claude.com（the marketing site）— design tokens, components, icons, typography and motion, documented in a static site that is itself built with these very tokens.

startups.name: neovest
startups.description: Trustless, open-source token vesting for Neo N3. Self-deploy your own vault and share a transparent unlock dashboard.

startups.name: tokenhabit
startups.description: Scan your Claude Code logs and find the habits silently burning your tokens. No LLM calls, no deps, offline.

startups.name: worktide-web
startups.description: React 19 + Refine 5 + Vite + Tailwind v4 SPA frontend for the Worktide API. Custom API-Platform Hydra data provider, JWT auth with refresh-token rotation, shadcn/ui components, Mercure-ready for real-time updates.

startups.name: tokenscope
startups.description: Tokens cost dashboard

startups.name: superagent

startups.name: signal-hub

startups.name: Solarix
startups.description: A Solana indexer, in Rust — on-chain account data, made queryable.

startups.name: netpulse
startups.description: NetPulse is a high-performance, modern network discovery and analysis suite. It marries the speed and safety of low-level Rust raw-socket packet crafting with the developer ergonomics of Python, FastAPI, and Typer.  Designed as a modern monorepo, NetPulse is optimized for rapid Layer 2 (ARP) and Layer 3 (ICMP) network sweeps.
